title: Keep your cats away from hydrogen tanks 🎈
description: Keep your cats away from hydrogen tanks 🎈
prompt_text: A tabby cat stands on its hind legs, clinging to a large, bright green gas cylinder (likely an oxygen or industrial gas tank) with a brass pressure gauge and valve on top. The setting is an indoor workshop or garage with metal shelving units to the left, and a workbench cluttered with tools, papers, and miscellaneous equipment in the background. Overhead fluorescent lighting illuminates the space. A large, light-colored (mint green or pale blue) balloon begins to inflate rapidly from the top of the cylinder, eventually expanding to fill the entire frame.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A tabby cat stands on its hind legs, clinging to a large, bright green gas cylinder (likely an oxygen or industrial gas tank) with a brass pressure gauge and valve on top. The setting is an indoor workshop or garage with metal shelving units to the left, and a workbench cluttered with tools, papers, and miscellaneous equipment in the background. Overhead fluorescent lighting illuminates the space. A large, light-colored (mint green or pale blue) balloon begins to inflate rapidly from the top of the cylinder, eventually expanding to fill the entire frame.

cinematography.mood: Playful, surprising, and visually striking, transitioning from an observational tone to a surreal, all-encompassing spectacle.
cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level with the cat and cylinder. The camera is static, but the inflating balloon creates a dynamic, expanding visual that eventually fills the entire frame.

actions: A tabby cat stands on its hind legs, leaning against the green gas cylinder, looking upwards at the valve and gauge.
The cat's paws are placed on the side of the cylinder.
A large, light-colored balloon begins to inflate rapidly from the top of the cylinder.
The cat is briefly pushed back by the expanding balloon.
The balloon continues to inflate at an accelerating rate, quickly growing in size.
The balloon expands until it fills nearly the entire frame, becoming a massive sphere.
dialogue: Loud sound of rapidly rushing air/gas as the balloon inflates.
